notes: Brazil's federal-government portal hosting federal legislation. The Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD) is published here.

match_nodes.description: Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados

data.official_name: Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados
data.description: Brazil's general data protection law (Law 13.709/2018), modeled on GDPR.

Brazil's foundational internet-rights law, sanctioned April 23, 2014 -- often called the 'Constitution of the Internet.' Establishes net neutrality, freedom of expression online, and privacy/personal-data protection principles predating the LGPD (secid:regulation/planalto.gov.br/lgpd). Regulated further by Decreto 8.771/2016.

match_nodes.description: Brazilian AI Bill (Marco Legal da IA) — pending legislation

data.description: Comprehensive AI-regulation bill modeled on the EU AI Act: risk-tiered classification (excessive/high/low-moderate risk), rights for affected persons (transparency, explanation, contestation), creation of a National AI Regulation and Governance System (SIA), and fines up to R$50 million per violation.
data.notes: Status: NOT YET ENACTED as of this sweep entry. Approved unanimously by the Federal Senate December 10, 2024; still pending final Chamber of Deputies plenary vote as of mid-2026. Revisit once sanctioned into law -- track via camara.leg.br tramitação page.
